name: react-bits
installMethod: shadcn registry — copies component source directly into the project
installNote: Each component has a verified registryName in the form {ComponentName}-TS-TW. The full install URL is https://reactbits.dev/r/{registryName}. Use the registryName from each component entry — do not guess or abbreviate it.

peerDependencies.motion: Required by BlurText, CountUp, AnimatedList. Install: npm install motion
peerDependencies.gsap + @gsap/react: Required by SplitText. Install: npm install gsap @gsap/react
peerDependencies.gsap: Required by FadeContent. Install: npm install gsap
peerDependencies.ogl: Required by Particles, Aurora. Install: npm install ogl
peerDependencies.@react-three/fiber + three: Required by Silk. Install: npm install @react-three/fiber three

appliesTo.heading: Wraps or replaces a heading element (<h1>, <h2>) with animated text
appliesTo.stat-number: Wraps a numeric value in a stats/counter block
appliesTo.section-background: Fills a section's background — the section must have position:relative and a set height or min-height
appliesTo.section-entry: Wraps an entire section or block so it animates in on scroll
appliesTo.card-wrapper: Wraps a card or tile to add a hover effect layer
appliesTo.list-container: Wraps a vertical list of items
appliesTo.element-border: Wraps any element (button, card, badge) to add an animated border

usageNote: This is an effect layer — it decorates structural components from the base library (shadcn/ui), it does not replace them. Apply effects selectively to high-impact elements (hero headings, stat numbers, key CTAs). Not every block needs an effect.

components.name: BlurText
components.description: Heading text blurs and fades into view word-by-word or character-by-character on scroll.

components.name: SplitText
components.description: Heading text slides in letter-by-letter or word-by-word using GSAP on scroll.

components.name: CountUp
components.description: A number animates from a start value to a target value using spring physics.

components.name: FadeContent
components.description: Any block of content fades (and optionally blurs) in as it scrolls into view.

components.name: Particles
components.description: WebGL floating particle field fills a section background — subtle when using small count and low speed.

components.name: Aurora
components.description: Flowing aurora borealis colour wash fills a section background.

components.name: Silk
components.description: Fluid animated silk-like shader fills a section background — elegant and minimal.

components.name: SpotlightCard
components.description: A mouse-tracking spotlight glows under the cursor as it moves over a card.

components.name: GlareHover
components.description: A diagonal glare sweep plays across a card on hover — like light reflecting off glass.

components.name: AnimatedList
components.description: List items appear one-by-one with a stagger animation, with optional keyboard navigation.

components.name: StarBorder
components.description: An animated star/sparkle travels continuously around the border of any element.
